task_completion.description: Navigate to the Pay Codes section in TimeTrex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TimeTrex interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Pay Codes' management page, list, or creation form.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Hazmat Bonus' pay code as an Earning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out or a list entry showing the name 'Hazmat Bonus' with the type explicitly set to 'Earning'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Trainer Premium' pay code as an Earning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out or a list entry showing the name 'Trainer Premium' with the type explicitly set to 'Earning'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Lost Equipment Fee' pay code as a Deduction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out or a list entry showing the name 'Lost Equipment Fee' with the type explicitly set to 'Deduction'.
A final list or table view in TimeTrex displaying all three newly created pay codes ('Hazmat Bonus', 'Trainer Premium', 'Lost Equipment Fee') saved in the system.

integrity.description: The agent used the TimeTrex web interface to create the pay codes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the TimeTrex application, not a terminal or script execution.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the answers into a text editor or dummy page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for the pay codes must be clearly within the TimeTrex application's specific form fields or data tables.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing PostgreSQL (psql) commands or database scripts should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly three pay codes in TimeTrex: 1. 'Hazmat Bonus' (Type: Earning), 2. 'Trainer Premium' (Type: Earning), 3. 'Lost Equipment Fee' (Type: Deduction). Verify these exact names and corresponding types are visible in the TimeTrex interface.
